why_them: WordPress site with Guestline booking integration and a live chat widget — technically functional but relying on a dated jQuery datepicker and Ajax iframe booking flow that creates friction on mobile. The site is heavy with multiple tracking scripts likely hurting Core Web Vitals. Room pages exist but lack compelling lifestyle photography or SEO-optimised copy to differentiate from chain competitors nearby.
recommended_service: Performance audit and SEO content overhaul
outreach_hook: Your booking flow loses guests to slow scripts and an outdated iframe widget before they ever hit the checkout.

location: The Crichton, Bankend Road, Dumfries, DG1 4UQ
why_them: Independently operated Holiday Inn franchise on its own domain, built with WordPress and Divi — a generic template that does little to convey the 100-acre Crichton Estate setting. The navigation has seven top-level items each with deep submenus creating a complex user journey hurting mobile conversion. Bookings route out to the IHG engine, breaking the on-site experience entirely.
outreach_hook: Your Divi site sends wedding and event leads through seven layers of menus before they can even find a contact form.

why_them: Custom site using the QBook booking engine — an obscure ageing platform with no modern direct-booking incentives or rate comparison. The codebase has inline CSS embedded in HTML rather than external stylesheets, indicating an outdated build with no clear developer maintaining it. With over 1,800 reviews and strong social proof, the property's digital presence is punching well below its reputational weight.
recommended_service: New website with modern booking integration and local SEO
outreach_hook: Over 1,800 five-star reviews and your website is still running an obscure booking engine that guests struggle to trust.

why_them: WordPress with Elementor and a Google Mail address as the primary contact email — a serious credibility red flag for a 5-star luxury property charging premium rates. Booking redirects through two separate third-party platforms creating a fragmented guest journey. The plugin stack is bloated and likely failing Core Web Vitals. A hotel of this calibre with a garden spa deserves a bespoke presence, not an Elementor template.
recommended_service: Brand-led website rebuild with consolidated booking and professional email hosting
outreach_hook: A 5-star spa hotel listed with a Gmail address loses trust before guests even read your room descriptions.

why_them: Divi-built WordPress site for a distinctive family-run country house hotel on the Solway Coast, but the booking system takes users off-site to a separate Cloudbeds reservation link entirely. The homepage stylesheet is extremely heavy with no performance optimisation. For a property with a chef-proprietor narrative and farm-to-table story, the site does almost nothing to communicate that USP visually or through structured content.
recommended_service: Storytelling-led redesign with integrated booking and improved page speed
outreach_hook: Your farm-to-table chef story is buried under a bloated Divi theme that pushes guests to a third-party booking page.

why_them: Website has multiple broken placeholder images across room and dining sections. There is no online booking engine — the Book a Room CTA goes to a contact page asking guests to phone. No email address is published anywhere on the site. The Food and Drink section shows only a logo with a generic call-to-action, suggesting the build was never completed. This level of neglect on a hotel near the M74 corridor is a significant missed revenue opportunity.
recommended_service: Full website rebuild with online booking and complete content
outreach_hook: Your rooms page is showing blank placeholder images — guests booking near the M74 are clicking away to competitors instantly.

why_them: Built on WordPress with a generic Colorway theme and zero online booking capability — guests must phone to reserve a room. Internal navigation links such as Rooms and Rates point to a broken sample page rather than real content, actively misdirecting visitors. No email address is surfaced on the homepage. Facebook integration is non-functional. The site is a clear candidate for a full rebuild given the passing A75 trade it could convert.
recommended_service: New website with online booking system and rooms and rates content
outreach_hook: Your Rooms and Rates link goes to a broken demo page — every guest trying to book is hitting a dead end.

why_them: Built on Wix Studio — an unusual platform choice for a unique luxury lighthouse hotel commanding premium rates and five-course fine dining. The site has no visible online booking engine or room availability widget, forcing guests to email or call for reservations. With its unique position as one of Scotland's most distinctive hotel experiences, the current Wix build fails to capture organic search traffic and the extraordinary property story is undermined by a standard template.
recommended_service: Bespoke website with SEO, direct booking and experience-led content
outreach_hook: Scotland's most unique hotel stay is hidden behind a standard Wix template with no way to book online.
